description: A designed graphic showing a profile booking-style photograph of a woman with shoulder-length brown hair against a height-chart background. Below, on a black panel, white and red text reads 'ILLEGAL ALIEN ARRESTED FOR ALLEGEDLY KILLING HER DAUGHTER AND INJURING THREE OTHER CHILDREN ARRESTED BY ICE IN ARIZONA'. A Fox News channel logo is at the bottom.
notable_text: ILLEGAL ALIEN ARRESTED FOR ALLEGEDLY KILLING HER DAUGHTER AND INJURING THREE OTHER CHILDREN ARRESTED BY ICE IN ARIZONA; FOX NEWS channel
